arts.ttl: Manchester United have not made contact for signing – Claims of transfer movement dismissed
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim becoming Manchester United manager meant it was inevitable multiple Sporting CP players would be linked with the Premier League club. Perhaps most obvious is Viktor Gyökeres, who Amorim helped turn into one of the most prolific strikers in Europe.
